data.title: Microservices Architecture
data.description: Spotify employs a microservices architecture where each service focuses on a specific functionality.
data.technical_spec: Services communicate over HTTP/REST and utilize data stores like Kafka and Cassandra.

data.title: Service Discovery
data.description: Dynamically discovers services using a custom-built service registry.
data.technical_spec: Built using Java and Scala, integrating with DNS for service resolution.

data.title: Event-Driven Processing
data.description: Real-time data processing using an event-driven model.
data.technical_spec: Integrates Apache Kafka to enable processing and streaming at scale.

data.title: Cloud Infrastructure
data.description: Heavily reliant on cloud services for scalable infrastructure.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes Google Cloud Platform for operational scalability and fault tolerance.

data.title: API Gateway
data.description: Centralized API gateway for managing traffic and enforcing security policies.
data.technical_spec: Golang-based implementation with features for throttling, authentication, and routing.
